_comment: V2.1 single source of truth for the practice deck. Re-audited 2026-07-21 by running the ACTUAL test suite on the final branch feat/shadow-shared-story-adapters @ 5f655e8 (node scripts/run-tests.mjs). Statuses use the V2 vocabulary and never collapse authored/host-tested/built/device-validated. The stale 1,824/1,827 and 1,858/1,861 figures and the '(V1 said ...)' note are RETIRED and must not appear on any slide.
project_title: Shadow: A Cryptographically Verifiable Evidence and Spatial Audit System for AI-Assisted Decisions
thesis: From AI answers to independently verifiable decision evidence.
author: Alex Ji

audit.note: Newest worktree; merges shadow-3d-scene-v1 + Three.js prototype AND adds the guided-story compiler (cross-target semantic hash), HTML adapter, and Three.js story adapter. Supersedes the 1,858/1,861 (V2) and the 1,866 handoff figures.

tests.skips_reason: environment-gated (Mistral OCR key / live-network / OpenSSL feature) — not disabled coverage

council.value_semantics: persona prior — STANCE STRENGTH (not confidence, not probability of correctness)

canonical_tamper_fixture.note: matches host test shadow-guided-story-three-adapter: 'seq-3 first failure ring + downstream degraded edges'. Live demo, Slide 7 and speaker notes all use seq 3.

unity_game_view_note: No real Unity Game View capture exists in the repo (only an explainer preview). Slide 9 shows Three.js renders labelled Three.js and describes Unity in text; it does NOT display a Three.js image labelled Unity.

capabilities.note: deterministic guided-story compiler with cross-target semantic hash
adapter contract: status visual never colour-alone, layout projection finite, focus+context, seq-3 tamper scene
semantic-convergence parity with the Three.js adapter (same semantic hash)

generated ShadowSpatialContract.g.cs matches the shared registry (actions/states/statuses); Android build toolchain checked. Unity editmode/playmode NOT run here. DEVICE-VALIDATION-PENDING (Beam Pro).
no Beam Pro / XREAL device claim; no real Game View capture to display
schema fail-closed, injection quarantine, citation resolution, stale-citation detection

demo_fallback_video_label: Open bookmarked fallback video (Shadow verify full demo)
honesty_guardrails: Cryptographic verification establishes integrity, not correctness.
A valid signature does not prove the source was truthful.
Fixture signing is not production signing.
Head-directed hover is not eye tracking.
No user study means no demonstrated 3D comprehension benefit.
Persona value is stance strength, not probability of correctness.
Unity is authored + contract-drift-tested, not editmode/playmode-tested here and not device-validated.
No Beam Pro / XREAL device claim without device evidence.
